hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ruff format "$f" && uv run ruff check --fix "$f";; esac > /dev/null 2>&1 || true

input=$(cat); [ "$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = true ] && exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; out=$(uv run ty check 2>&1 && uv run pytest -q 2>&1) || printf '%s' "$out" | jq -Rs '{decision:"block",reason:("ty check or pytest failed - fix before finishing:\n"+.)}'
